observation: Paxos said it would halt minting new BUSD tokens effective February 21, 2023
market_health_use: Track whether stablecoin issuance can still expand or has entered wind-down mode

observation: NYDFS said it ordered Paxos to cease minting Paxos-issued BUSD because of unresolved oversight issues related to Binance
market_health_use: Monitor regulator orders that change stablecoin issuance or redemption assumptions

observation: Paxos said existing BUSD customers could redeem BUSD for U.S. dollars or convert BUSD to USDP
market_health_use: Measure redemption-path availability and conversion options during supply wind-downs

observation: Paxos reported that it safely redeemed $7.9 billion of BUSD in one month without market disruption
market_health_use: Track redemption velocity after issuer or regulatory shocks

observation: The Crypto Times reported that BUSD had a market cap above $16 billion when Paxos announced the issuance halt
market_health_use: Compare stablecoin market cap before and after minting status changes
